summary: App entry point, page routing, and sidebar navigation via Streamlit multipage navigation.
Shared parsing, plot styling, copy-table controls, Excel/PDF export, and reusable plotting functions.
Computes descriptive summaries, confidence/tolerance intervals, ANOVA, Tukey HSD, and reference-vs-sample tests.

topic: Stats Suite – Regression and Shelf Life
summary: Fits linear models, produces confidence/prediction intervals, and estimates shelf-life crossing points.
General linear models, factor/covariate ANOVA, and PCA score/loading plots with ellipses.
FDA-style f2 comparison with selected time points, checks, and optional bootstrap intervals.
Fits single/double/triple Weibull models to dissolution data and selects the best model by AIC.
Fits release models directly to PK data using analytical Weibull input rates and compartment ODEs.
Transforms saved in vitro profiles via time scaling, compares against saved in vivo release or PK, and back-predicts PK.
Builds factorial, CCD, mixture, mixture-process, and co-solvent experimental designs.
Fits response-surface models, enforces hierarchy, and generates diagnostics and contour/surface plots.
Exports tables to Excel and PDF, renders figures to PNG bytes, and exposes table copy controls.
